text: CGTMSE (Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises) Eligibility: New and existing MSEs engaged in manufacturing, services, or trading are eligible. Agriculture and self-help groups are typically excluded. Benefits: Provides collateral-free credit (term loans and working capital) by covering a significant portion of the loan amount in case of default. Application: Approach participating lending institutions (banks/NBFCs). The lender applies for the guarantee cover after sanctioning the loan.

Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY) Eligibility: Indian citizens with a business plan for non-farm income-generating activities (manufacturing, trading, or services). Benefits: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh (Shishu: up to ₹50k, Kishore: up to ₹5 lakh, Tarun: up to ₹10 lakh). Tarun Plus extends to ₹20 lakh in specific cases. Application: Apply online via Mudra or PSB Loans portals, or visit any public/private sector bank or microfinance institution.

CLCSS (Credit Linked Capital Subsidy Scheme) Eligibility: Micro and small manufacturing enterprises registered under Udyam, planning to purchase approved new machinery via a term loan. Benefits: 15% upfront capital subsidy (maximum ₹1 crore) for technology upgradation. Application: Apply for a term loan from an approved Primary Lending Institution (PLI). Submit subsidy application through the PLI after loan availing.

Udyam Registration Eligibility: Any business enterprise (manufacturing or service) meeting investment and turnover criteria for micro, small, or medium enterprises. Benefits: Official recognition as MSME, access to government subsidies, collateral-free loans, procurement tenders, and easier compliance. Application: Entirely online, free, and paperless on the official Udyam portal (https://udyamregistration.gov.in/) using Aadhaar and PAN.

Stand-Up India Eligibility: Women or SC/ST entrepreneurs aged 18+. At least 51% stake must be held by them. Only for greenfield (new) projects. Benefits: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for at least one SC/ST and one woman borrower per bank branch. Application: Apply online via Stand-Up India portal (https://www.standupmitra.in/) or through a local bank branch.
